notes: No individual-level record for Jacqueline Elizabeth Chattin (PE1239 / parole 345JW) was returned by any web-accessible search result. The PA DOC Inmate Locator (inmatelocator.cor.pa.gov), Pennsylvania VINELink (vinelink.vineapps.com/state/PA/ENGLISH), and PA SAVIN all require direct, interactive browser-based queries with JavaScript enabled — their live databases are not crawlable or indexable by search engines, and no cached or third-party record for this specific individual appeared in any public search index as of June 29, 2026. To obtain a confirmed, real-time status you must: (1) Visit https://inmatelocator.cor.pa.gov and search by inmate number PE1239 or name; (2) Visit https://vinelink.vineapps.com/state/PA/ENGLISH and search by name or ID; (3) Call PA DOC Central Office at 717-728-2573; or (4) Call PA SAVIN at 1-866-972-7284. These are the only authoritative sources for current custody, transfer, parole, or discharge status.
